concept: Sudoku.com - Number Games: Players fill a 9x9 Sudoku grid by tapping cells and selecting numbers, adhering to rules that each digit appears once per row, column, and 3x3 subgrid. The game offers assistance features like hints, undo, and notes, with difficulty levels determining puzzle complexity. Progression is based on completing puzzles, earning stars or coins for unlocking new themes or hints, and maintaining daily streaks.
name: Sudoku.com - Number Games
